content:
Portfolio health review initiated. I've aggregated data from all 8 active programs. Current headline:

- 🟢 **5 programs** on track
- 🟡 **2 programs** at risk
- 🔴 **1 program** off track — Mobile App Modernization

Overall portfolio health: **Moderate**. Risk exposure at 32% (threshold: 25%). NPV forecast: £12.4M of £14M target (88%). Would you like the full KPI snapshot or a drill-down into the off-track program?
Show me the full KPI snapshot first.

**Portfolio KPI Snapshot — February 2026**

| KPI | Value | Target | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| Value delivered | £4.6M | £5.0M | 🟡 92% |
| Budget utilisation | 78% | 80% | 🟢 |
| Risk exposure | 32% | <25% | 🔴 |
| Resource capacity | 86% | 90% | 🟡 |
| Stage gate compliance | 70% | 80% | 🟡 |
| On-time delivery | 87% | 88% | 🟡 |

NPV forecast: **£12.4M** (target £14M). The gap is driven primarily by Mobile App Modernization. Shall I drill into that program?

**Mobile App Modernization — Off Track 🔴**

| Attribute | Detail |
|---|---|
| Schedule | 3 weeks behind (identity provider dependency) |
| Budget | £18k contingency drawn; £25k change request pending |
| Open risks | 2 High, 1 Medium |
| Last gate | Design Gate passed (conditional) |
| Rebaseline | Requested — awaiting Elena Brooks' approval |

**Recommended actions:**
1. Approve rebaseline request (Elena Brooks, 24h SLA)
2. Confirm £25k budget supplement (Sophie Lang, 8h SLA)
3. Stand up weekly executive checkpoint until program returns on track

Shall I prepare the executive briefing note?

**Executive Briefing Note drafted** — Mobile App Modernization Recovery Plan:

> **Situation:** The program is 3 weeks behind schedule due to a vendor dependency on identity provider sandbox access. Active mitigation is in place with a fallback auth owner assigned.
>
> **Actions taken:** Rebaseline requested, contingency draw initiated, resource reallocation underway via open workflow.
>
> **Decision required by 28 Feb:** (1) Approve rebaseline; (2) Approve £25k budget supplement.

Routing to Elena Brooks for review. Priority: High. SLA: same business day.

**Briefing note sent to Elena Brooks.** ✅

- Priority: High · Same-day SLA
- Carbon copy: Marcus Hill (Portfolio Manager), Sophie Lang (Finance)
- Portfolio risk review scheduled: next Monday 09:00
- Audit trail updated with all actions

All program managers have been notified of the updated portfolio status. I'll alert you the moment the executive decisions land.
